hb909defegfd5dg4010g8046g414c21c8c3c5: Away. I have no more need of you.
hcf62f955gde43g4c17g9690g85bc8160f1fa: Indeed? Then when the lightning comes, it has one fewer to strike.
heb1cdf1bg45a9g49ccgbaa5g08d0a407c9e8: I do hope you didn't come expecting my thanks. That would be most perplexing.
hdacabf93gdcc1g4625gbf5ag855a2957c586: Indeed? Then removing his people should provide you little challenge.
h3b21a5e6g23c7g4d36ga177g1c02671c4186: Why are you here? I sent you to Zevlor.
heb363d9agc8abg483bga132g98057d376c9a: A grey dwarf - in our grove, on this day. A sign. Or rather, a gift.
hf5d5d6afg4416g41degb545gf7d83c681020: Who better to understand a watchful broodmother than one who hails from... below?
h59fc3fd4g7d07g4ab6ga6b2g685d5fb66481: A deep elf - in our grove, on this day. A sign. Or rather, a gift.
h41788fcag634ag4a92gbceag9cd39b4b5e99: Who better to understand a watchful broodmother than a beloved child of Lolth?
h323f3eb6g885cg4d35g9b9cga517bce9ae04: I'm nothing like you - I don't kill children.
h587d6513ga7b6g4b57g9ca5gf6472891194c: Bah. I'd thought one like you might understand. When a threat makes itself known, you remove it.
hf1e92941gd1f2g47fcg87ecg2aab95b3427c: I don't make a habit of threatening children.
ha46323d5g7102g456agac52g6b84241427ff: You protected your own without hesitation - my compliments.
h02b347b8gf424g4f56g9395gcdb2ac6f08f1: And yet you petitioned on the thief's behalf. A curious display of mercy.
hb0918666g5d52g4010g9ff2g626f75c36d74: A viper bares her fangs defending her brood. Is it not her nature to strike at invaders?
hc8403792g27bfg4307ga33fg827e771dfd58: I took back the Idol of Silvanus and the rite has resumed. We will seal the grove. Free from harm. Free of intruders.
he85f322ag5cfcg4e50g8960g11a5ef5f116a: Then we agree. Preservation is not luxury, it is not zealotry. It is necessity.
hbe365b59g7116g4e2dg8e9fg494823d93b28: I'd have killed the thief outright.
haa38bb7cg673ag4c89g97b1gcabdac17c3d9: And still you petitioned on her behalf. Your words are vicious, yet you showed mercy.
h16ac70c7gf502g46f8g8f1bga7b4b8037f11: Yes. Yes. This could be the true way of Silvanus.
hd221997cg366eg45fcg9dcdgde736726316b: The viper bares her fangs defending her brood. It is only right that she strike the killing blow.
hab7e366ag8720g402aga20cga6cda1b2fe78: The others might consider this sacrilege. But we know the truth: it is necessity.
ha3929239g0ce9g4c21g9d09gd63ca752dbbe: Don't we? I've studied duergar culture. You have an instinct for survival.
h46bb72a5g04b9g46d5ga772g8598fdc17b03: A viper bares her fangs defending her brood. Is it not her nature to strike at invaders?
h21d3dbe2gd696g4f8eg9645g9ea450cf6fb3: No matter. I took back the Idol of Silvanus and the rite has resumed. We will seal the grove. Free from harm. Free of intruders.
h2b18c632g83fbg4762g846agbcfc6cfb2347: I know the truth. You mean to take the grove for the Shadow Druids.
hf78e8035gf4f4g48c6g91a6g1f0380acd36b: Is this rite druidic? I have never witnessed such magic.
hdb3203a9g5efcg4165ga45dgb5ccc53bea53: This rite must be born of powerful magic.
h6f5538a0gaf1fg424bg9cc8g849b3043b02f: The Rite of Thorns. It is the Treefather's gift, that none come to harm. When we speak the final prayer, the Great Vine will sprout forth.
hb5d3ec04g1a80g43f2g9400g2b5a457c3ae5: The grove will be cloaked in bramble and thorn. No one enters, no one leaves. Sanctuary.
h4c4e8c96g0689g49edgbeb8gda7354fce679: *Past teachings come into focus. The Rite of Thorns is a rare practice, outlawed in most circles for causing more harm than it eases.*
he783f9adg63b7g42e9g9465g5cc4a380a77c: None of this can happen while outlanders infect us. Silvanus demands that we choke them out.
h2a8a420dg1aceg4d99gaf89gc5c6acecb095: You'd leave them to die on the road.
h1eae6a58g54afg4e92gbe1age593d3eb0b04: I am First Druid now. I protect the circle, whatever the cost.
h47e7d08dge448g40ceg8e05g8fb1beed0f48: I came on Zevlor's behalf. His people could perish if you force them out.
h203e260bg033ag40c3ga239g42d6bb22b91f: And mine perish if he stays.
h59a44a0cg134eg4f88gbc01g4cc21ee30571: What does forcing them out achieve? They've done nothing.
h6efe0882g7a53g4a30ga0f2gf00fcbdbef9c: You must let them stay. They've done nothing to harm you.
hdbac06ffg71dag44b4g8e6dg343ca3dca28f: You cast out the guiltless. You shame your order.
h177f7bb9gdab8g40d6g8134g019c27466c97: 'A disease of the flower must not reach the root. Pluck the petals. Sever the branch if you must. But cut out the rot before it infects the whole of the wood.'
ha6b53102gf2a0g4f6cga540gcd5bb86f375c: Teachings of Silvanus, you must agree.
h7aeff334g4a74g48abgb564gdeb1aa6523ef: I know the Treefather's teachings as well as you.
h6a3d12a8gc14dg4fc0g9916g40084c93e18b: Then you know I heed his wisdom. I protect the Circle, whatever the cost.
ha6cb09d3g0a75g46e0gb7c7g1160a733ed8c: You showed great mettle at the gate - the mettle of a skilled sword for hire.
ha9c32817g481dg4350g92bcge460894a5604: I want you to provide your services to the tiefling leader - Zevlor, he's called. Offer to guide the outlanders out of the grove. I'm sure they'll reward you well.
h5b4c5ba8ge3feg4586g97d4gf88d45b62d48: They're to be gone before final prayer. If they are not...
h06c3aa4bg61b1g4a70g8adbg53158a5f76f1: The viper can stand down. Zevlor is already dead.
h17a8713ag660cg4d21ga29cgbe47032c5cb0: I'll see what can be done about them.
h1e648a08gc7aeg4f6ega7bagbfb1e8881460: This tale ends but one way: with the outlander rot cleansed and the grove forever shrouded.
h48a607dbgbf69g49bfg8735gefd2c3522d29: I've done enough. They're your problem, not mine.
h065984e1g6179g4bcfg9d9ag4d0ab3369e75: Then they soon know the sting of my venom.
h777698c2g6430g4b6cgac0dgf161ed8c02c4: Get out. We have no more business.
hbb0b283bgb773g4770g84fag8ff8af0f6ff7: Then it seems I'd best speak to Zevlor.
h90b54f1fgbf13g4a3cga2b0g2ebec83bbe64: You will do more than speak.
h6831fecdg8872g451bg826cgaff62543fb86: Prattle all you want. The refugees aren't my concern.
hf78e1742g8a88g4a7bga907g49764955e28d: I want you to provide your services to Zevlor. Offer to guide the outlanders out of the grove. I'm sure they'll reward you well.
h4ad5ab2agb479g4b79g9974g913b49041a70: I hardly know every line of doctrine.
h0ed34b02gcfe3g43bbg8853g544aa70f5b8a: Then why do you doubt my acts and intent?
h4ed8ad4ag53aag48bdga74bg17085254d1c9: You showed great mettle at the gate - the mettle of a skilled sword for hire.
h5dd77df6g59efg41efgacf4g4f91b90ce93e: Words you have twisted to justify your cruelty.
h2fe80e7fga962g48d6ga733g4bd02069e27c: Words I heed to the letter to keep my brood safe.
hb8fe8126gc927g475agb31eg25bd81d7caa5: Teachings of the Treefather, do you agree?
h052468aagd8aeg4e72ga689gb8cdeb3d2bfe: Turning your back on the needy - is this truly the way of Silvanus?
h3d4a867dg4752g4ce8ga88dg1710e1c56bc9: Turning your back on the needy - is this truly the way of Silvanus?
hb4ff9cecg171bg4b15gac06gf3486fcf02a6: Do what you want. It's none of my concern.
ha9d748d6g0432g4c88g8532gfb1fd1e7c680: So you say. Yet you share their infernal blood.
ha8676206g52b1g4997g89aag17af1d7b5a21: Ah yes. You like to meddle. See what happens. So let me tell you what happens next.
h9ca51a81g5179g4798g8672g7c8d1220ffd3: You will offer your services to the tieflings' leader - Zevlor, he's called. And you will guide the outlanders out of the grove.
ha5d95381g84ebg4ae3g8a83g9273a97b7a8e: You will offer your services to Zevlor, guide the outlanders out of the grove.
had2a640dgf3d2g42d4gbabag30100c8d7ac8: Then I was wise to grant you entry. And you'd be wise to heed my words.
h6618caa6g6419g468cgaa46g4a65ea94c848: So you say. Yet you share their infernal blood. And the child walks free.
h03205028g629ag4693gb5e5gf67069fbf753: So you say. Yet the child walks free.
h5d08ae89g60fcg4ec2g9eafg3f3c47bc8ffa: Stay your hand. This is neither the time nor the place.
h106714d2g5893g4f53g90d5g48e949b5d35c: Have you finished your chatter? Then you will give me your ear.
h1d9b6e94gb39dg4bd9gafeeg5520d9dfe107: Keep talking. Nothing to be gained in picking a fight with a fanatic.
h6966f282gb737g4aacg9159gf397d8ca3651: |Get a grip. This isn't our business.|
hb10bdf78gd7a1g410dg9c3fge9458a47fef6: |Get a grip. This isn't our business.|
h58e0da2cgee39g4c13gb8b7gf29e8f02f213: |Get a grip. This isn't our business.|

h345523a9g7f5cg459fg971egb00565cbac1d: Hold. Give diplomacy a chance to do its job.
h0893d4ecg8de1g46c4g902fg4fc08e2eedad: The outlander serves Zevlor! Circle - to arms. Let no parasite live!

hce3d413dg425bg4b3bg803agd650c3890d0f: A clear choice, I would say.

hd5262d5dg1d26g4a59gb65fg6ccf4bc9b18f: She stole the Idol of Silvanus during prayer, and interrupted the rite.
hbec781fbge6aag409dg99cegae6d26ee87e0: Why, I don't know or care.
h7b3b5900g04eeg4344ga62eg55657e7d0f97: Don't we? I've studied drow culture. You have a talent for self-preservation.
hc624431bg7079g406ag9654g4de48c7ac8df: I have no love for the Queen of Spiders.
h9aa49069gd9eag4ea8ga932g9d6da4deb406: Indeed? But you do exhibit a talent for self-preservation.
he7522796g4c7cg4a66ga99cg1bf276458af9: I worship Eilistraee - not the Queen of Spiders.
he1354df1gb391g4ab8gb40bg53d909356d47: Indeed? Then above all, you must have a talent for self-preservation.
h65756d57g0843g47a3g9e37gc0b6e6b05bf0: Go on. Say it. You think I'm a monster.
hb2f97df3ge991g4e4fga7ffg1819f6bd27d5: Monster? Too kind. A demon, more like.
h780946bcgf9eeg45d5gaae4g0c09c8a11c9c: Do you expect pity? You killed a child in cold blood.
h8123e050gea2fg4cc6gadf5gaad66e3c0e51: You've the skin of a beast. If only your heart was so bold.
h951c0fafg2761g4991gac44gd0115827be71: A viper bares her fangs defending her brood. I call her mother. You call her monster.
h2496bc3eg1d6bg48bdg9087g6b8578bbe2f7: I know your kind. You see only victims and villains.
ha9f75734g7527g486fg8e4fg65db16e6d3b1: Only a monster would threaten a child.
hf784fd28g0bd5g4746ga5fdgd31bd178095c: I know your kind from other circles. You see only villains and victims.
hb05cd929g333fg42f1g90f5g4c828e48c7e0: Yes - you would say so. I know your kind. You see only villains and victims.
h3f801038g9edcg4f45gb016g581c78b21a9d: You're protecting your own - sometimes cruelty is required.
h638c62b5gbe60g44eaga2e6ga29d97c59642: First you urge grace. Then you speak truth. To think a devil could surprise me twice over.
h869505fdgdbe6g4499gb744g2368c03010da: A shame the grace period ends. The viper's fangs have been bared. She must guard her brood.
he1515d9bg583bg4c03gacb5gb4929c79c57f: First you urge grace. Then you speak truth. You've surprised me twice over.

hd74395d2g9d7bg4839g9f0ag58b4f8e18d5d: Honestly, I just wanted to see what would happen.
h2e9b78f3gf660g4be4g99f8gf3bb81cecb9c: Ah - you don't see a monster. You just look at me through one's eyes.

h4622cbc7g1830g41b1g8371g1b3d66b2f2cb: You are like the devils. Where they tread, chaos follows.
h205eb139g6071g4901g83bcg630e3b648c10: Monsters both, then. Viper to viper. Beast to beast.
h8975f22ag3937g4529gbe6dg51fef9136cbc: Monsters both, then. Viper to viper.
h1e12ecdag8f58g45d9ga7b5g928bf6ba7c95: Not at all. That was quite a show.

h5ebd2b8ag7257g4063g9606g4bb18e1597d2: Accidents do not exist. There is only choice and consequence.
h088a049fga1c9g45fcgb3d2g6f104e352d3e: The devilspawn imperiled my brood. I bared my fangs to defend it. Choice. Consequence.
h66961df3gdb72g46fcgb93bg1c9f4f52cdbb: Now the Idol of Silvanus is returned and the rite has resumed. We will seal the grove. Free from harm. Free of intruders.
h6148440bg80ecg42e0g8789g47c31b927c18: The Rite of Thorns is risky magic. Is it not banned in your circle?
hf2079f8ega813g4713g9776g1f94a344b8e3: And if it is? Strangers are the scourge; the rite is the remedy. No laws can change that.

h22ac67f5g6a25g48b1g876bg284291e2ce81: This rite must be born of powerful magic.

hfe31cf4egcdf7g49fdg82fag822ce2c3b6e0: Nettie, yes. She's bumbling about somewhere.
h072d33c2g60eag4429g8cc3gc975a9a40de0: But if your treatment is meant to outlast the rite, you'll be removed with the rest.
hefdc0916gfe6cg4c4eg9150g69f4d1e93958: Zevlor's people need refuge. You can't deny them that.

h5aa795bag0b1fg4099ga408gf9bf31745062: Zevlor wants you removed. I'm here to see it done.
